chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1222 - وقال عليه السلام: " وقت صلاة الجمعة يوم الجمعة ساعة تزول الشمس ، ووقتها في السفر والحضر واحد وهو من المضيق، وصلاة العصر يوم الجمعة في الأولى في سائر الأيام.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1222 - The Imam (as) said:
"The time for the Jumu’ah prayer (Salat al-Jumu'ah) is on Jumu’ah at the hour when the sun begins to decline (zawal). Its timing is the same for both travelers and residents and is considered limited (specific). The Asr prayer on Jumu’ah is performed at the time of Dhuhr on other days."
